channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "That's a lot of jobs": Trump Says China Agreed To Buy 200 Boeing Jets

media:content.media:description: Boeing's last order from China's authorities came in 2017, when Trump visited Beijing.

item.description: US media reports had described a possible China order of around 500 single-aisle Boeing 737 MAX planes, in addition to 100 larger models, such as the 787 Dreamliner and 777.
item.content:encoded: US media reports had described a possible China order of around 500 single-aisle Boeing 737 MAX planes, in addition to 100 larger models, such as the 787 Dreamliner and 777.

item.title: US Jury Awards $49.5 Million To 2019 Boeing 737 MAX Crash Victim's Family

media:content.media:description: Nearly all of the civil lawsuits around the crash had been settled out of court.

item.description: The suit was brought by relatives of Samya Stumo, who died in the March 2019 Ethiopian Airlines crash which claimed a total of 157 lives.
item.content:encoded: The suit was brought by relatives of Samya Stumo, who died in the March 2019 Ethiopian Airlines crash which claimed a total of 157 lives.

item.title: US Man Arrested After Video Shows He Hurled Rock At Endangered Seal In Hawaii

media:content.media:description: Lytvynchuk from Washington, was taken into custody on Wednesday

item.description: Igor Mykhaylovych Lytvynchuk, 38, from Covington, Washington, was taken into custody near Seattle on Wednesday and charged with harassing a protected marine animal, according to the US attorney's office in Honolulu.
item.content:encoded: Igor Mykhaylovych Lytvynchuk, 38, from Covington, Washington, was taken into custody near Seattle on Wednesday and charged with harassing a protected marine animal, according to the US attorney's office in Honolulu.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Says Xi Offered Help To Open Hormuz, Vowed Not To Arm Iran

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News Live Updates

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Trump Invites Xi Jinping For Visit At White House In September

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: 'US Policy On Taiwan Unchanged': Rubio After Trump Meets Xi

media:content.media:description: Rubio made the remarks in an interview while travelling with the president on his trip to China.

item.description: Rubio sidestepped Xi's warning that differences over the self-governing island could lead to a clash and said that China always raises the issue of Taiwan in talks.
item.content:encoded: Rubio sidestepped Xi's warning that differences over the self-governing island could lead to a clash and said that China always raises the issue of Taiwan in talks.

item.title: Mexican Judge Dies After Saving Her 3-Year-Old Son During Deadly Bee Swarm Attack

media:content.media:description: According to Mexican media, she sustained most of the stings to her face and torso.

item.description: Witnesses said Ramirez Burciaga acted instinctively to protect her three-year-old son, Matias, when the swarm suddenly descended on the crowd.
item.content:encoded: Witnesses said Ramirez Burciaga acted instinctively to protect her three-year-old son, Matias, when the swarm suddenly descended on the crowd.

item.title: 4 Killed After Small Medical Plane Crashes In US' New Mexico

media:content.media:description: The cause of the crash was unknown.

item.description: The flight departed from Roswell Air Center and was headed to Sierra Blanca Regional Airport, the Federal Aviation Administration said in a statement.
item.content:encoded: The flight departed from Roswell Air Center and was headed to Sierra Blanca Regional Airport, the Federal Aviation Administration said in a statement.

item.title: Why India Is Tightening Gold And Silver Imports As Middle East Crisis Deepens

media:content.media:description: Government data shows that India's dependence on imported gold and silver has been rising steadily

item.description: Government data shows that India's dependence on imported gold and silver has been rising steadily over the years, adding to trade deficit and forex depletion concerns.
item.content:encoded: Government data shows that India's dependence on imported gold and silver has been rising steadily over the years, adding to trade deficit and forex depletion concerns.

item.title: Attack On Indian Ship Shows No Route Is Safe In Hormuz As Iran Tightens Grip

media:content.media:description: Five attacks in just ten days suggest that Iran now intends to maintain a firmer grip on Hormuz

item.description: The location of the attack suggests that the cargo ship was following a new shipping corridor that emerged after Iran blocked the main shipping lanes in the Strait of Hormuz in March.
item.content:encoded: The location of the attack suggests that the cargo ship was following a new shipping corridor that emerged after Iran blocked the main shipping lanes in the Strait of Hormuz in March.

item.title: Lebanon, Israel Hold New Peace Talks In US As Ceasefire Nears End

media:content.media:description: The ceasefire, which began on April 17, lasts through Sunday.

item.description: Israel's military said it was striking Hezbollah targets in south Lebanon on Thursday after warning residents of several towns and villages there and in the country's east to evacuate.
item.content:encoded: Israel's military said it was striking Hezbollah targets in south Lebanon on Thursday after warning residents of several towns and villages there and in the country's east to evacuate.

item.title: 'Xi Said China Won't Arm Iran, Offered To Help Open Hormuz Strait': Trump

media:content.media:description: The two leaders met in Beijing.

item.description: "He said he's not going to give military equipment... he said that strongly," Trump said.
item.content:encoded: "He said he's not going to give military equipment... he said that strongly," Trump said.

item.title: US Official Targets Indians, Hyderabad's Chilkur Balaji Temple Over H-1B Visas

media:content.media:description: He said programmes such as H-1B, L-1, F-1 and OPT are "hollowing" Americans

item.description: In a series of posts on X, the Republican senator from Missouri attacked the US employment-based visa system, alleging it suppresses local wages and creates a global "Visa Cartel" that displaces American workers.
item.content:encoded: In a series of posts on X, the Republican senator from Missouri attacked the US employment-based visa system, alleging it suppresses local wages and creates a global "Visa Cartel" that displaces American workers.

item.title: Murder To Money Laundering: 12 Of The UK's Most Wanted Criminals Believed To Be Hiding In Spain

media:content.media:description: In the past year alone, 56 fugitives were extradited from Spain back to the UK.

item.description: Officials say Spain remains a common hiding place for British criminals because of its large UK expat population and strong travel links.
item.content:encoded: Officials say Spain remains a common hiding place for British criminals because of its large UK expat population and strong travel links.

item.title: "Make It Work And Never Mess It Up," Xi Tells Trump At Beijing Summit

media:content.media:description: Xi said the relationship between US and China can only "advance" if there is "mutual respect"

item.description: "The world is changing and turbulent," Xi said and noted that the relationship between the two countries impacts not just the 1.7 billion people who live in both countries but also the 8 billion people who live outside the two countries.
item.content:encoded: "The world is changing and turbulent," Xi said and noted that the relationship between the two countries impacts not just the 1.7 billion people who live in both countries but also the 8 billion people who live outside the two countries.

item.title: UK Health Minister Resigns, Says Lost Confidence In PM Starmer's Leadership

media:content.media:description: Streeting is popular on the right of Labour, but is disliked by MPs on the left.

item.description: Wes Streeting, 43, did not say whether he had the required support of 81 Labour MPs -- 20 per cent of the party in parliament -- to trigger a contest.
item.content:encoded: Wes Streeting, 43, did not say whether he had the required support of 81 Labour MPs -- 20 per cent of the party in parliament -- to trigger a contest.

item.title: Beijing Roast Duck To Tiramisu: Inside China's State Banquet For Trump

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump with Chinese President Xi Jinping at the state banquet in Beijing.

item.description: Reflecting on his talks with Xi, Trump described their discussions as "extremely positive and constructive", while thanking the Chinese leadership for what he called a "magnificent welcome" at the start of his state visit.
item.content:encoded: Reflecting on his talks with Xi, Trump described their discussions as "extremely positive and constructive", while thanking the Chinese leadership for what he called a "magnificent welcome" at the start of his state visit.

item.title: "UAE Directly Involved In Act Of Aggression Against Iran": Abbas Araghchi

media:content.media:description: Iran has repeatedly accused Gulf states of allowing US forces to carry out attacks.

item.description: Araghchi also referred to what Israel has described as a "secret" meeting in the UAE during the war between Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and UAE President Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan -- a visit Abu Dhabi has denied took place.
item.content:encoded: Araghchi also referred to what Israel has described as a "secret" meeting in the UAE during the war between Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and UAE President Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan -- a visit Abu Dhabi has denied took place.

item.title: Iran Allows Chinese Vessels To Pass Through Hormuz Strait: Report

media:content.media:description: Iran severely restricted transit in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: A Chinese supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude sailed through the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: A Chinese supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude sailed through the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday.

item.title: Why Denmark Is Less Afraid Of AI-Linked Job Losses And Can India Follow

media:content.media:description: Denmark introduced an economic model called 'flexicurity' in the 90s

item.description: Denmark's 'flexicurity' model is helping workers fear AI disruption less. Can India replicate it?
item.content:encoded: Denmark's 'flexicurity' model is helping workers fear AI disruption less. Can India replicate it?
